title: Pune University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Pune University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pune University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Pune University:
Pune University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pune University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
